message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineHeadBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderColor black
skinparam lifelineHeadFontColor black
skinparam lifelineHeadFontName Arial
skinparam lifelineHeadFontSize 14
skinparam lifelineHeadFontStyle plain
skinparam lifelineHeadFontWeight normal
skinparam lifelineHeadPadding 10
skinparam lifelineHeadMargin 10
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderThickness 1
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderRadius 5
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderLineStyle solid
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderLineColor black
skinparam lifelineHeadBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderColor black
skinparam lifelineHeadFontColor black
skinparam lifelineHeadFontName Arial
skinparam lifelineHeadFontSize 14
skinparam lifelineHeadFontStyle plain
skinparam lifelineHeadFontWeight normal
skinparam lifelineHeadPadding 10
skinparam lifelineHeadMargin 10
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderThickness 1
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderRadius 5
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderLineStyle solid
skinparam lifelineHeadBorderLineColor black

actor "Kamera" as Kamera
actor "Šlagbaumas" as Slagbaumas
actor "Valdiklis" as Valdiklis
actor "SAVS informacija" as SAVS
actor "Žurnalas" as Zurnalas

Kamera -> Kamera: numeris = atpažintiNumerį()
Kamera -> Valdiklis: atpažintaMašina(numeris)
Valdiklis -> SAVS: patikrintiNumerį(numeris)
SAVS --> Valdiklis: patikrintiNumerį(numeris)
Valdiklis -> Zurnalas: įrašyti(numeris)
alt [numeris apmokėtas]
    Valdiklis -> Slagbaumas: atidarytiŠlagbaumą()
end

@enduml
